title: Rebirth
content:
The world spun around Chen Fan as he lay dying on the cold stone floor of the forbidden chamber. Blood trickled from the corner of his mouth, staining the ancient runes beneath him. His once-powerful body was now nothing but a shell, broken and empty.

"You thought you could defeat us, Chen Fan?" A mocking voice echoed through the chamber. "The Heavenly Sword Sect will never fall into the hands of a mere mortal."
